title: senecio otites
intro: Senecio otites, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Senecio. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio otites include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Senecio otites can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
